_publications._publicationTitle: A randomized placebo-controlled lovastatin trial for neurobehavioral function in neurofibromatosis I.

_contextSnippet: There was a significant differential effect of treatment over time...favoring the lovastatin group for...one secondary cognitive measure (HVLT; P = 0.02; f² =0.19)
details: Significant differential treatment effect favoring lovastatin group (P = 0.02, f² = 0.19), with scores improving from 33.50±10.62 to 35.29±11.01 in lovastatin group vs declining from 37.67±14.04 to 23.50±5.82 in placebo group
